message:
fix: resolve compilation errors from sibling agent changes

- stdlib_abi: remove duplicate repair_enabled and scan_c_string defs
- glibc_internal_abi: add missing ApiFamily/MembraneAction imports
- glibc_internal_abi: fix ApiFamily::Thread -> ApiFamily::Threading
- pthread_abi: fix undefined name_cstr with proper CStr conversion
- stdio_abi: use AtomicPtr.store() instead of write_volatile
- stdlib_abi: remove unused heal imports

These fixes address compilation errors introduced by parallel agent
work on membrane policy instrumentation and path manipulation moves.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
